name: Development feature: profile preferences persistence
description: Update profile scheduling preferences, reload to verify persistence, and verify the default duration is applied to a new event.

planSteps.description: Type demo@timeora.app into the email field
Type TimeoraDemo123! into the password field
Click the Sign In button and wait for the dashboard to load
Click the Profile avatar button, then click Profile in the dropdown
Verify the Profile page shows Account Information, Scheduling Preferences, and Data & Privacy controls including Export All Data
Set Timezone to Asia/Jakarta, Default Event Duration to 45, Working Hours Start to 08:00, and Working Hours End to 18:00
Verify the message Preferences saved successfully! appears
Verify Asia/Jakarta, 45, 08:00, and 18:00 remain populated after reload
Click Back to Dashboard once, wait for /dashboard, then click + Add Event once
Verify the new event dialog defaults to 09:00–09:45, representing the saved 45-minute duration
Click Batal to close the dialog without creating data
